Edit.Title: Adjust {{name}}.
Edit.Description: This screen edits the profile that is currently active in the top bar. Changes apply to future search, scan, and result analysis.

Create.Title: Add another profile
Create.Description: Create another named profile for a family member or a different allergy setup. You can save it empty and tailor allergens later.

Form.NameNote: Use a clear name so switching between family members stays quick and reliable.
Form.NameError: Enter a profile name before saving.
Form.LoadErrorDescription: Please check that the backend is running and try again.

Summary.Title: Profile summary
Summary.CreateEmpty: This profile is empty for now. You can save it and add allergens later.
Summary.EditEmpty: This profile has no monitored allergens yet. Add them now or save the empty profile for later.
